message:
chore(beads): close 8 stale HIGH beads already satisfied on main

Drain of review-queue staleness. Each bead's claimed deliverable is
already live on main; marking closed so triage reflects reality:

- br-pa2y: githooks/ committed + scripts/install-hooks.sh.
- br-ffhs: ci.yml split into fmt/lint/test/conformance/gates/security/
  licenses/secret-scan/fuzz-regression.
- br-tne4: 5 pub error enums carry #[non_exhaustive]
  (fp-frame / fp-io / fp-expr / fp-index / fp-conformance).
- br-lvl6: fuzz/regressions/README.md + crates/fp-conformance/tests/
  fuzz_regressions.rs sentinel test infrastructure landed.
- br-thty: rustfmt.toml pinned edition 2024 + 100-col max + imports
  policy.
- br-wskz: [package.metadata.docs.rs] on each per-crate Cargo.toml
  via workspace.package inheritance.
- br-kmbc: ci.yml lint matrix carries features: ["", "--no-default-
  features", "--all-features"] × os.
- br-h8a8: [workspace.package] carries keywords/categories/repository/
  homepage/documentation + per-crate descriptions inherited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
